column1: Troy Johnston headlines the slate with a steady bat atop the Rockies' order, boasting a strong 73.7% hit probability and the platoon edge at hitter-friendly Coors. Right behind, Trea Turner brings his reliable profile and top-of-order role into another favorable park, making him a sharp play despite being on the road. Jonathan Aranda also stands out with a solid matchup and platoon advantage, while Yandy Diaz and Nico Hoerner round out the list as steady leadoff options with trustworthy contact skills. This is a lineup built for streaks—stack with confidence.
